atoms.name: Estimated billing & catch-up rebilling cycle
Bill line-item correctness (VAT, segment labelling, non-commodity recovery)
Three settlement clocks (physical/financial/regulatory) reconciled per bill
Historical data reveal-over-time (point-in-time blindfold at the source, not just company/ code)
Synthetic future market generation beyond real 2016-2025 history
Year-over-year margin bridge with residual reconciliation
Opex/cost-to-serve mechanism -- full B2 taxonomy (true/benchmark ledger, fixed floor, break-even, segment capital/ROCE, concentration)
Hedge-tariff alignment (cost locked when price is locked)
Competitor field (price ceiling / undercut pressure)

Regional basis risk (COUPLED): the company settles regional volumes at published zonal prices but can only hedge nationally -- no regional forward market exists -- so a regionally-skewed book carries unhedgeable basis; gap = assumed-national-hedge protection vs realised zonal basis cost (company twin of W1_8)
Customer segment flavour fields (smart meter, dual-fuel, home/business type)
Portal discovers customer physical-property truth through observable interfaces, not a direct read
Per-customer satisfaction heterogeneity (payment-channel gap + individual variation)
Double-entry ledger + management accounts (income statement)
Single reconciled revenue definition across every reporting surface
Accrual accounting + restatement handling
SIM/company epistemic barrier verifier (static + timing)
Population-level + Qwen-skeptic sanity daemon, R5-compliant alerting
Obligations register + domain invariants (risk-tiered compliance checks)
Monotonic, non-saturating growth metrics (cumulative commits, test-execution count)
Unified event log shared across sim/company for the epoch-2 reveal spine
Customer archetype layers (home type, payment channel, tenure, fuel poverty, occupancy)
Per-run stochastic population draw (vs current fixed cast)
Competitor supplier field (world-side)
Household budget sketch as hidden SIM state (income band, essential-cost floor, discretionary margin, savings buffer, priority-of-debts stack)
Life-event stream (job loss, illness, divorce, retirement, new child) -- ONE shared W2 event generator
SME/I&C distress twin (sector shocks, insolvency events, late-payment culture)
Can't-pay vs won't-pay -- hidden ABILITY x WILLINGNESS 2x2, classified by the company under uncertainty
Pay-but-don't-heat self-rationing (perfect payment record, consumption collapses below plausible living levels)
Segment T&C / regulatory overlay on debt (statutory business late-payment interest, domestic late-charge exclusion, payment-conditioned tariff eligibility)
DD attribution confound -- first entry of the 'selection-bias traps the company must discover' class
Ofgem price cap as a BINDING constraint on SVT pricing (not just a lookup)
Real settlement timetable (D+1/D+... true-up) as an explicit world mechanism
Typed, versioned-message SIM/company boundary adapters (go-live seam)
Epistemic verifier extended to data-flow/timing violations, not just literal imports
Formalised learn-loop / retrospective cadence
Decision-rights register + bitemporal decision-event logging
Approval interface (requests-awaiting-decision surface, human-operable)
Sim-approver (policy-agent playing the human approver for tournament runs)
Development-time epistemic wall (lane hook pilot, fork as enforcement not risk)
Harness skills/ and path-scoped rules/ -- procedure moved out of CLAUDE.md into decay-resistant mechanism
Supervisor self-refill (dial-weighted maturity-map draw, replacing the fragile prose-scan)
tree_lock() serialized git writes across concurrent daemons/sessions
Banking & Payment Rails simulator (twin: Bacs/bank/acquirer)
Payments & billing maturity audit (M2 entry gate) -- 22+ existing modules graded vs D/E charters
Hidden adoption physics (bother-threshold, friction sensitivity, trust/reassurance, reward responsiveness)
Key moments as conversion windows (EV purchase, house move, boiler failure, smart-meter install, bill shock, renewal)
Incentives and loyalty integrated into billing (points, rewards, free/half-price hours, miles, prizes as bill-visible artefacts)
Production-readiness non-functional evidence pass (recoverability, security posture, capacity, availability)
Go-live NFR register (availability/SLOs, security, data protection, operational resilience, capacity, incident response)
Harness bootstrap + disaster recovery (reproduce the machine that runs the company, not just its data)
Company-internal authz (roles, maker-checker, segregation of duties)
Security profiles (Developer/Restricted/Hardened) -- sandbox posture as a director-governed model
Ofgem supply licence readiness (fit-and-proper test, financial resilience/ring-fencing, Standard Licence Conditions go/no-go)
Tournament fitness function + mortality rules (which company variants survive/die across generated-future runs)
Concurrent BUILD forks do not lost-update maturity_map.yaml (map stays single source of truth)
SITE CONSTITUTION doors 3-8 built (the surfaces an expert actually inspects), pixel-verified
Concurrent BUILD atoms run in isolated git worktrees (native isolation: worktree), map read-during-build
Typed internal seams between billing/pricing/settlement/collections, enforced like the epistemic wall (Epoch 3)
Record the worktree-miss retro as durable method IP (5 findings + meta) in the casebook; wire Finding-1 trigger
The Naive Organ: a deliberately-amnesiac agent that questions the SYSTEM's claims/state (manufactures the outside view)
Poesys brand identity as an AI-usable schema: design-tokens source + agent-loaded rules + preserved exemplar + live-site adoption + brand-compliance check
VAT-by-segment control must check against a segment signal INDEPENDENT of the bill's own label (currently a tautology)
Structural bill-integrity invariants: arithmetic footing + non-negativity/fail-CLOSED + temporal sanity
Obligations register coverage + traceability: physical-harm rows, resolve-or-degrade tracker, enforcing-invariant key
Mutation-test the entire control apparatus: every control must fire on its own named defect (kill list + the 3 killer patterns)
Close the 5 mutation-found control gaps (KL-4..KL-8): fail-silent/fail-open/tautology in compliance trackers + the consistency gate
The coupled triad: SIM depth -> company copes through the wall -> harness measures the belief-vs-truth GAP (the gap is the score)
Can't-pay vs won't-pay classifier: the company classifies each arrears account under uncertainty (world twin of W2_7)
Self-rationing detection: the company detects pay-but-don't-heat before harm (world twin of W2_8)
Life-event detection + response: the company notices job loss/illness/divorce/etc through the wall (world twin of W2_5)
Affordability inference + book-mix belief: the company infers each customer's ability-to-pay and its book composition through the wall (world twin of W2_4/W2_2)
Channel attribution analytics: the company's naive attribution SHOULD be capable of being wrong (world twin of W2_10)
SME/I&C credit-risk model: the company assesses business distress through the wall (world twin of W2_6)
Segment-correct debt policy objects: the company applies the right debt T&C per segment (world twin of W2_9)
Judge validation: outcome-test the verdict-producing organs we cannot mutation-test (consistency + independence + gold set + outcome correlation)
Harm-cost weights decision framing (can't-pay/won't-pay HARM vs LOSS): anchors, ratio, and the pursue->forbear flip-point -- for the director
L1 national weather: coherent AUTOCORRELATED joint national temp/wind/solar signal (weather persists -- cold spells and still spells last; temporal autocorrelation is physics not noise)

L2 regional weather: FEASIBLE, spatially-correlated regional deviations that are AGGREGATION-CONSISTENT with the national signal (demand-weighted regional aggregate reconciles to national -- an invariant, mutation-tested)

L3 premise-level shape: each property's half-hourly demand = f(its LOCAL weather, thermal performance, heating type, occupancy, archetype) + idiosyncratic noise; aggregate premise demand reconciles to national demand (invariant, mutation-tested)
L4 price as a DERIVED output: national weather -> national demand + renewable output -> residual demand -> merit order -> wholesale price (price is NEVER an independent draw)

Weather-normalisation twin (COUPLED): the company INFERS its book's weather-sensitivity from confounded meter data -- gap = predicted vs actual demand under a given weather outturn (world twin of W1_5)
Renewable capacity + generation-mix evolution over time
Zonal / locational marginal pricing mechanics (the regional-basis market that does not exist today)
Demand-side response / flexibility markets
EV + heat-pump adoption geography (spatially-varying load growth)
Alert on a persistently-jammed publish pipeline: N consecutive auto-process rc=1 fires one NTFY (silent-retry-forever gap)
tmux idle-detection byte-stability gate: only inject when the pane is UNCHANGED across a re-capture (close the residual mid-turn injection)
Experiment-loop speed: cut the inner-loop cycle time that makes the Epoch-4 evolutionary tournament arithmetically feasible (mock-interface + parallelism + tiered tests)

Autonomous build-executor: a governed headless-turn executor that CONSUMES the Rule-0 self-refill draw and lands work (the map moves without the interactive session as sole executor); ALSO the Epoch-4 tournament substrate

Unified Failure Register: one append-only cross-retro index with GLOBAL per-class strike-counting (Nth-strike is a class property), theme-tagged, surfaced on the Method door -- so two-strike/R3 redesigns fire on time, not years late
Harness-self mutation audit: point R15 INWARD -- mutation-test the controls that watch the controls (the verdict organs / meta-controls), not just the SIM/compliance controls H12 covered

Name the EXTERNAL-TRUTH WALL constitutionally: the five failure themes are one failure at different altitudes -- the boundary between what the machine KNOWS and what is EXTERNALLY TRUE; make it a first-class architectural law
Pre-build effort sizing (S/M/L/XL) calibrated against git-timestamped actuals: decomposition trigger + honest remaining-effort + estimate-vs-actual learning signal
Audit our harness against the mature PROCESS/delivery disciplines (Lean/Kanban/ToC/SRE/Agile), not just the novel-AI ones: name what we have, adopt known refinements, surface unhit gaps
Escalation is NTFY not the window + route-around-before-stopping: the loop NTFYs the irreducible core and keeps drawing (a blocked atom blocks only itself)
WIP limit + cycle-time flow dashboard (Kanban): make throughput/flow visible, cap concurrent BUILD WIP by verified-capacity not fork-count
Theory-of-Constraints ritual: name the current single binding constraint each cycle and subordinate to it (five focusing steps)
SRE error-budget + toil tracking: quantify recurring toil (the treadmill) and gate discretionary work on a self-caught-failure budget
Definition-of-Ready gate: an atom is BUILD-eligible only when framed/scoped/sized/exit-test-defined (name our ad-hoc level gates as DoR/DoD)

Parallel MAINTENANCE lane: a standing worker drawing bug-fix/housekeeping/notification-hygiene work concurrently with BUILD/DISCOVER/SITE, integrating per-atom through the external-truth gate, bounded by file-scope disjointness

Activity-based cost + utilisation: attribute elapsed-time AND tokens to a PRODUCTIVE/WASTE activity taxonomy from existing git/token/deadman data; surface productive-%, cost-of-self-maintenance, rework-rate, value-per-problem, idle-on-director on the Method door
Escalation payload is self-contained: the NTFY body carries WHAT/OPTIONS/CONTEXT/WHY-DOOR/DEFAULT so a one-word phone reply resolves it; an on-box log link is never the substance (tightens H19)

Scheduled housekeeping: a standing cadence+threshold sweep (maintenance-lane function) that inventories and clears cruft — stale worktrees, dead branches, staging droppings, unbounded logs, orphaned tmux, local/origin drift — reversible-by-default, never touching in-flight work

FRAME-saturation draw marker: the idle-DISCOVER/FRAME self-refill must not re-hand a FRAME-saturated BUILD-gated atom (no honest FRAME-stage output left) — skip it in favour of a genuinely un-FRAMEd idle atom, re-offer only when its BUILD-gate opens; mutation-tested both directions
Rebuild the operational layer to OPERATIONAL_LAYER_DESIGN.md (one designed system, not accreted patches)
Collapse the inert session_watchdog.py dead code into worker_seat (post-migration cleanup)
Fully-qualify pane-scoped tmux targets (bare -t claude is window/session ambiguous)
Governance mutation test: prove the autonomous worker REFUSES director-gated/HELD work at top of queue
Turn-transport failure must be a first-class alarm (broken pull loop != healthy idle worker)
Draw excludes atoms blocked on an external/director act (stop the done-atom idle treadmill)

Account hierarchy + payment allocation: party->account->agreement->supply-point; balance-based vs open-item accounting fork per segment; one segment-parameterised ageing/dunning/statutory-interest/write-off engine (M2 FRAME->build)

Supplier reporting standard: CSS-shaped Consolidated Segmental Statement (Ofgem SLC 19A form, 4 segments + aggregate) + board KPI block, wired into the live annual report; fuel-mix disclosure already exists; obligations-register additions deferred

Auto-reap completed-fork WORKTREE dirs: fork_reconciler is report-first + BRANCH-focused, so merged/salvaged fork worktree DIRECTORIES have no automatic reaper -- they climb (observed 2->7 in one session) until a manual `git worktree remove`; mechanise a cleanup of CLEANUP_ELIGIBLE (merged) + salvaged worktree dirs so the count self-limits under a fast fan

Self-governance detection-hardening: forge-proofing (sub-step 7, crypto-tie FRONT_OPEN/GATE_CLEAR/LEVEL_UP provenance to director_input_log HMAC/console-presence), level-baseline fail-silent edge (git-ref read fails -> LEVEL gate stops checking, surfaced but not paged), is_build_authorized loop_stage defense-in-depth (currently relies solely on the upstream _is_valid_candidate idle-drop; add a stage re-check), and wire fronts_reconciler.evaluate onto a LIVE cadence (reconcile-watch timer) so detection pages transition-only, not only on-demand

Guard against silent core.bare=true corruption: the main repo's core.bare flipped to true this session, silently breaking ALL work-tree git ops (commit/publish/status) until manually reset -- root-cause what sets it (worktree op? concurrent daemon git without tree_lock?) and add a detector/guard (assert core.bare==false pre-commit; the publish pipeline depends on git)

Publish gate blocks by @pytest.mark.operational partition: daemon-lifecycle tests can alarm but NEVER wedge the live-site publish; content/surface-generating/safety-wall tests still block. Replaces the fail-open directory-wide tests/background ignore. Follow-on: give the deselected operational layer an independent-cadence green signal

Pre-commit test-gate GIT_* env isolation: FIXED -- the gate ran changed test files during `git commit` WITHOUT scrubbing GIT_INDEX_FILE/GIT_DIR/GIT_WORK_TREE, so git-touching tests corrupted the SHARED .git (index phantom-deletions, a tree-deleting commit, and repeated core.bare=true). THE ROOT CAUSE of H26. Fix: strip GIT_* from the pytest subprocess env

Phone-answerable [ACT] channel: director resolves authority-requiring decisions from his phone in seconds (forge-proof, no SSH/console paste) -- Tailscale-identity-gated + pre-framed tap/single-word answers, provenance-logged like a console act, console as fail-closed fallback

Payment-behaviour generator (sim-source, coupled-triad W of the D5 decomposition): baseline generator of customer payment behaviour -- who pays when, DD success/failure, arrears/late-payment patterns, payment-method mix -- ANCHORED TO EXTERNAL real-world payment statistics (Bacs DD failure rates, DD take-up, payment-timing distributions), decided BLIND to company P&L (R13 baseline). Difficulty dials are CURRICULUM (director-authored), not agent-tunable.

Payment observable seam (coupled-triad SEAM of the D5 decomposition): the typed, versioned SIM/company interface through which the company OBSERVES payments -- bank statements, remittance advices, settlement/BACS reports, DD success/failure notifications -- exposing OBSERVABLES ONLY (never the sim payment-behaviour internals). The go-live payment adapter seam (swap sim for real bank/Bacs behind the unchanged contract).

Payment belief-vs-truth gap (coupled-triad HARNESS of the D5 decomposition): the harness measures the company's payment BELIEF (its allocation/ageing/cash-position inference from observed payments, D5) vs the world's payment TRUTH (the W2_11 generator's actual behaviour). No world payment-source reaches L3 until this gap is measured against the company's consumption (COUPLED_TRIAD binding rule).

epoch2_movements.name: The clock and the log
epoch2_movements.exit_test: The hedge decision literally cannot see past ‘now’; a restatement lands as an event and downstream values version correctly.
epoch2_movements.status_note: Bitemporal log + as-of interfaces built; hedge-decision price history migrated onto PointInTimeView (2026-07-11) -- 'cannot see past now' half of the exit test now structurally true and tested. Investigated the remaining two sub-components before building (docs/design/M1_EVENT_DRAIN_MATERIALITY_FRAME.md): the sim's outer decision loop is already event-shaped; the real step-based cost is settlement-record generation itself (hedged_settlement.py), which is ground truth, not overhead -- a same-day rewrite risks corrupting real data for a scaling concern that isn't live yet (~8min/run today, not blocking). Deliberately deferred pending a director/advisor sequencing call, not built blind.

epoch2_movements.name: Three clocks through the books
epoch2_movements.exit_test: The two revenue series reconcile BY DESIGN, and a bill can be lawfully wrong then corrected on the portal.
epoch2_movements.status_note: Entry-gate payments maturity audit complete 2026-07-11 (docs/design/M2_PAYMENTS_AUDIT_DD_RAILS.md + M2_PAYMENTS_AUDIT_BILLING_COLLECTIONS.md): verdict HARDEN-EXISTING for the company-logic layer, NEW BUILD for the Banking & Payment Rails simulator (Bacs rails-physics layer is entirely absent). Build not yet started -- waits on M1's exit test per the framing's own sequencing.

epoch2_movements.name: Discovery and the draw
epoch2_movements.exit_test: The company mis-estimates a new customer's consumption, bills wrong, discovers, rebills -- end to end on surfaces; two runs with different draws produce different books.
epoch2_movements.status_note: Design-only in background forks per the framing's own spike integration (section 5). Not yet started.

epoch2_movements.name: Rederivation and the reckoning
epoch2_movements.exit_test: The director reads the rederived decade and recognises a real supplier's life.
epoch2_movements.status_note: Strictly last, per the framing. All headline public figures are PROVISIONAL until this lands (site/supplier/index.html banners, 2026-07-11).
